name_en: Small Tote from the latest Qixi Limited Edition series. Sweet Qixi, a unique romantic style, is so attractive to girls. The red body is embellished with small red flowers, super gentle and sweet, helping you capture moments of love. Exquisite embroidery paired with black cowhide, sweet yet elegant. The bag comes with an adjustable long shoulder strap, preserving the simple shape while offering the large capacity of a big bag. It can be carried by hand or worn diagonally, fully meeting daily travel needs.

Size: 26*12*21cm
